title: The Presidents Emoluments and Pension  Act, 1951

provisions.title: Emoluments of the President.
provisions.content:
1[1A. Emoluments of the President.— There shall be paid to the President by way of emoluments 2 [3 [five lakh rupees]] per mensem.

[Footnote] 1 Ins. by s. 4, ibid. (w.e.f. 16-12-1985). 2 Subs. by Act 28 of 2008, s. 2, for "fifty thousand rupees" (w.e.f. 30-12-2008). 3 Subs. by Act 13 of 2018, s. 137, for "one lakh fifty thousand rupees" (w.e.f. 1-1-2016)

provisions.title: Sums to be charged on the Consolidated Fund of India.
provisions.content:
Any 1[sum] payable under this Act shall be charged on the Consolidated Fund of India.

[Footnote] 1. Subs. by Act 24 of 1962, s. 3, for "pension" (w.e.f. 28-6-1962).

provisions.title: Power to remove difficulties.
provisions.content:
1 [6. Power to remove difficulties.— (1) If any difficulty arises in giving effect to the provisions of this Act, as amended by the President's Emoluments and Pension (Amendment) Act, 2008 (28 of 2008), the Central Government may, by order, do anything not inconsistent with such provisions for the purpose of removing the difficulty: Provided that no such order shall be made after the expiration of two years from the date on which this Act comes into force. (2) Every order made under sub-section (1) shall be laid before each House of Parliament.]

[Footnote] 1 Ins. by Act 28 of 2008, s. 5 (w.e.f. 30-12-2008).
